name: Coconut Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup C & H Brown Sugar; packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread oats and coconut in a shallow pan. Toast, shaking occasionally, in a 250 degree oven about 15 minutes or until lightly browned. Cool.
2. Cream together sugar, butter, and shortening. Beat in eggs, one at a time. Stir in vanilla, then oats and coconut.
3. Combine flour, baking soda, and salt, and mix into batter. Mix well.
4. Form into rolls about 1-1/2 inches in diameter on waxed paper. Refrigerate for 4 hours or overnight.
5. Slice into 1/4-inch thick pieces; place on a greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake in a 400 degree oven for 8 minutes. Cool on a rack. Makes about 6 dozen cookies.
